race.comment: DISMANTLE (3) is on the doorstep of another victory finishing runner-up in both runs this time in work. Boasts a win around this circuit and will be ready to peak now third-up from the spell. Rates the testing material. ESPRIT DU JOUR (9) saves her best form for this distance range with a win and four seconds from just six attempts. Worth serious consideration. The well-related SOME STYLE (5) (half to G1 winner Peeping) strips fitter second-up and may earn some minor money. BLAKEMORE AVENUE (1) is going well lately, winning two races from four appearances this campaign, including a last-start win at Sunshine Coast on heavy going. Shouldn't be underestimated.
